Bump the all group with 4 updates (#183)

Bumps the all group with 4 updates: [bzip2](https://github.com/trifectatechfoundation/bzip2-rs), [clap](https://github.com/clap-rs/clap), [flate2](https://github.com/rust-lang/flate2-rs) and [zip](https://github.com/zip-rs/zip2).


Updates `bzip2` from 0.5.1 to 0.5.2
- [Release notes](https://github.com/trifectatechfoundation/bzip2-rs/releases)

Updates `clap` from 4.5.30 to 4.5.31

- [Changelog](https://github.com/clap-rs/clap/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)

Updates `flate2` from 1.0.35 to 1.1.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/rust-lang/flate2-rs/releases)

- [Commits](https://github.com/rust-lang/flate2-rs/compare/1.0.35...1.1.0)

Updates `zip` from 2.2.2 to 2.2.3
- [Release notes](https://github.com/zip-rs/zip2/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/zip-rs/zip2/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/zip-rs/zip2/compare/v2.2.2...v2.2.3)

- dependency-name: bzip2
  dependency-type: direct:production

- dependency-name: clap

  dependency-group: all

  dependency-group: all
- dependency-name: zip

  dependency-group: all
...
